Command Hub: Controls capital defense & central provinces.
Missiles: Multiple Launch Rocket Systems (MLRS), Tactical Ballistics.

Western Air Command HQ & Main مقاتلة / طائرة Hub
Fighters: Occasional F-16/Mirage dispersal (Hardened shelters available).
Runway: Short strip for emergency مقاتلة / طائرة landing or helicopter ops.
UAE Navy HQ & Main Fleet Base

Support: Heavy logistics support for fleet.
Visiting Forces: Regular host to US Carrier Strike Groups & Amphibious Ready Groups.

Assets: Radar stations, Small docking pier for fast boats.

Assets: Command bunkers, VIP security compounds.

Assets: Amphibious vehicles, Anti-ship missile batteries (land-based).

Main Operational Hub & US Central Command Forward HQ
US Assets: ~40-50 (KC-135, KC-10, F-15s, ISR aircraft - Rotational).
Al Dhafra (Not to be confused with UAE)
Qatar does not have a separate base named Al Dhafra; this is often confused with the UAE base.

Fast Interceptors: ~10 Small coastal defense boats.
HQ: Supreme Command of Land Forces.

Assets: Tanks, IFVs, Command centers (Shared access protocols).
Hawk Mk.167: ~12-15 (Advanced Jet Training & Light Attack).

Main Operational Hub & US Coalition Base
